privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated dataset of 26 participants, 25 of which simulate normal human data and 1 of which (sub-99) is intentionally contaminated. The data generation script was verified to deterministically yield a math accuracy of 61.3% for sub-99, accurately reflecting the ~60% claim and correctly triggering the <0.85 exclusion rule.
